vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm giúp giải tỏa cảm xúc
vocab.example: For me, playing the piano is a truly cathartic experience that allows me to release all my pent-up frustrations.
I'm deeply steeped in the world of classical literature, spending most of my weekends reading 19th-century novels.

vocab.meaning: phương thức để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Pottery serves as a vital creative outlet for me, providing a much-needed break from my highly analytical day job.

vocab.meaning: thói quen giải trí ít vận động
vocab.example: While I enjoy hiking, I also appreciate more sedentary pastimes like playing strategic board games with close friends.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng/năng lực kỹ thuật bậc thầy
vocab.example: Coding started as a hobby, but it has now become a way for me to refine my technical prowess in software development.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động theo đuổi đơn độc/cá nhân
vocab.example: Long-distance running is a solitary pursuit that gives me time to reflect on my personal goals without any distractions.

vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: My interest in floral arrangement has definitely sharpened my aesthetic sensibility and eye for color coordination.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ tìm thấy (một sở thích mới)
vocab.example: I happened to stumble upon an urban gardening workshop last year, and it has since blossomed into a full-blown passion.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác được thoát ly khỏi thực tại
vocab.example: Immersing myself in sci-fi movies provides a wonderful sense of escapism from the mundane routines of life.
As an amateur enthusiast of astrophotography, I spend many clear nights capturing the beauty of the Milky Way.
